step_1_text:
• Click 'Browse' or drag a folder onto the window to select it.
• The left panel will show all files in the selected folder.
step_2_text:
• Use the 'Extensions' section to filter files by type.
• Use 'Sort by' to change the order of files.
• Tick/untick checkboxes in the 'Items' list to choose specific files.
• Use 'All' / 'None' buttons for bulk selection.
step_3_text:
• Sequential: Add numbers to filenames with optional prefix and padding.
• Add Suffix: Append text to the end of existing filenames.
• Video Format: Use video resolution and numbers in a custom pattern.
  - {n}: sequence number
  - {res}: resolution
  - {name}: original filename
step_4_text:
• Live Preview: Always check the 'Preview' section before renaming.
• Validation: Illegal Windows characters and reserved names are blocked.
• Atomic Rename: If one file fails, the whole operation rolls back.
• Undo: Revert the last operation using the 'Undo' button.
confirm_msg:
Rename {n} selected files?

This operation cannot be undone easily.
update_dialog_msg:
A new version v{version} is available.

Would you like to open the download page?
